summary: W848 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract and proves the exact selected-cochain Closed2 route: exactAcyclicTrianglehIso13SelectedCochainStrictification_of_closed2_homotopyEquivInvariance constructs the W847 selected-cochain payload from exact-acyclic homotopy-object Closed2 plus homotopy-equivalence invariance. Dbounded W848 routes show W812/W735 homology detection supplies the homotopy-invariance half for both closed-map and closed-embedding branches. The remaining task-4 obligations are still concrete W735 branch values, exact-acyclic Closed2 for MetrizableLCA without assuming W847, the universal comparison isomorphism, and the final original four-task witness/review packet.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W848 reduces W847 selected-cochain strictification to exact-acyclic homotopy-object Closed2 plus homotopy-equivalence invariance, but does not construct Closed2 for MetrizableLCA or concrete W735 branch values.

The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing because the W848 route still requires Closed2, universal comparison isomorphism evidence, and one concrete W735 exact-input branch.
ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations still record nonterminal evidence and lack originalFourTaskContractCompletion.
The review packet still does not expose the immutable-contract negative fixtures and clean extraction audit in the completion packet shape required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct exact-acyclic homotopy-object Closed2 for MetrizableLCA without assuming W847 selected-cochain strict realization.
Construct W735 closed-map or closed-embedding exact-input branch data for MetrizableLCA, including W721 localized-right-adjoint data and W722 source-triangulation data.
Construct the universal left-right comparison isomorphism for arbitrary MetrizableLCA short complexes if it cannot be discharged from the existing W821/W831 surface.
Expose a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after those inputs are real, then refresh the review packet fixtures and clean extraction audit.
